about.title: About VouliWatch CY
about.description: VouliWatch CY is a civic-tech project that tracks the Cyprus House of Representatives and explains parliamentary activity in plain language for citizens.
about.pillar2Desc: No need to watch hours of video

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Every Thursday, the plenary session is uploaded to YouTube
howItWorks.step2: We collect subtitles and agenda PDFs
howItWorks.step3: Data is fed into an AI model
howItWorks.step4: AI generates clear summaries of topics and decisions
howItWorks.step5: Published on Instagram, Telegram, and vouliwatch.cy
howItWorks.note: This project is in pilot phase. There may be inaccuracies.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Pilot Phase
disclaimer.text: VouliWatch CY produces results with AI assistance. We always try to cross-check with official sources, but errors may occur. If you find something inaccurate, please contact us.
